values: May
June
September

evidence.quote_or_summary: It is in the months of May, June and September.

values: Greener valley with patches of snow in upper reaches in May and June
Clearer skies with light showers expected at end of June
Trekking under shade of tall pine trees next to the gushing Nath River
Lush green valley after monsoons in September
Clearer air offering better views of surrounding landscapes in September
Crisp chill in the air as autumn arrives
High mountain peaks experiencing odd snowfall
Greens turning brown and then golden by October and November

evidence.quote_or_summary: In the months of May and June, the whole valley is greener and there are patches of snow in the upper reaches. The skies are clearer and you can expect light showers at the end of June. Trekking under the shade of tall pine trees next to the gushing Nath River is an experience cherished by everyone to date.

In September you'll notice the monsoons have turned the valley into a lush green. The air is also clearer offering you a better view of the surrounding landscapes. You might get occasional showers at early September.

As autumn arrives, the temperatures start dropping and there is a crisp chill in the air. You'll observe the high mountain peaks experiencing the odd snowfall or two. But down in the valley, the greens start turning to a shade of brown until they're golden in October and November.

values: Snow in upper reaches in May and June (not necessarily on the trail)
No snow on the trail in September
Odd snowfall on high mountain peaks as autumn arrives

evidence.quote_or_summary: Presence of snow: Snow in the upper reaches. Not necessarily on the trail.

values: May–June daytime: 18–24 °C; nighttime: 3–8 °C
September daytime: 8–10 °C; nighttime: 0 to -5 °C
2 warm layers required in May–June
5 warm layers required in September

No. of warm layers required: 2 warm layers.
No. of warm layers required: 5 warm layers.
